dialogueChunks.intro: You found the truth, {player_name}. And the truth, as usual, was more complicated than anyone expected.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The evidence you brought back proved that the {quest_focus} {quest_focus_was} never what it appeared. The council reversed their decision. {target_npc} was vindicated, and the real source of the problem has been dealt with. The {enemy_type} have retreated now that the deception has been exposed.
dialogueChunks.outro: You proved that the hardest thing to find isn't treasure or monsters: it's the truth.

playerResponses.text: The truth is always worth the effort. Even when it's uncomfortable.
Lesson learned, I hope. Be more careful with judgment next time.

dialogueChunks.intro: It's over, {player_name}. The damage is done, but at least the bleeding has stopped.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The settlement acknowledged the error, though not everyone is willing to admit they were wrong. {target_npc} accepted the apology with more grace than most would manage. The real perpetrator was identified thanks to your investigation, and the {enemy_type} threat has been neutralized.
dialogueChunks.outro: You can't unring a bell, but you can stop people from ringing it again.

playerResponses.text: Healing takes time. The important thing is the truth is out now.
Done is done. Learn from it and move forward.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the truth you uncovered saved lives. But it also revealed something about us that nobody wanted to see.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The council disbanded the group that acted on the false report. {target_npc} is helping rebuild what was damaged. The conversation has shifted: people are asking how they allowed bad information to drive them so far, so fast. The {enemy_type} weren't the real danger. We were, to ourselves.
dialogueChunks.outro: Sometimes the bravest thing you can do is hold up a mirror.

playerResponses.text: Self-reflection is harder than any fight. I'm glad it's happening.
Knowing your weaknesses is the first step to fixing them.
